column6: One of a set of conga drums that belonged to Dizzy Gillespie before he gifted them to a fellow musician on May 4, 1987.  Dizzy Gillespie used these conga drums when he performed with J.C. Heard and his Orchestra at the 1987 Montreux-Detroit Jazz Festival.
